chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P.No.S-1832 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For katcha peshi. 3. For hearing of MA-16082/2016 05.12.2016. None present for petitioner. Mr. Ali Abbas Memon, State Counsel. = None present for the petitioner, nor there is any intimation of the petitioner’s Counsel for his absence. Parawise comments have been filed on behalf of the police officials, wherein they have denied the allegations that police officials are patronizing any individual including the private respondents. The comments filed today on behalf of respondent No.3 also discloses the fact that there is some property dispute between the petitioner and private respondents, who are real brothers. Be that as it may, if the private respondents have any genuine grievance against the petitioner, they are at liberty to seek redressal of the same through due process of law and are not allowed to cause any harassment to the petitioner. With these observations and directions, the present constitutional petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Shahid
